title: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#090a0f`
* `#C06C88`
* `#B7D7CD`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>\n<rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
<rect x='30' y='30' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='220' y='30' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='30' y='80' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='220' y='80' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='30' y='130' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='220' y='130' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='30' y='180' width='380' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<rect x='200' y='220' width='150' height='40' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' fill-opacity='0.7'/>
<text x='50' y='55' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>Real-Time Analytics</text>
<text x='250' y='55' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>Query Playground</text>
<text x='50' y='105' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>Dynamic Filtering</text>
<text x='250' y='105' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>Sorting</text>
<text x='50' y='155' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>Multi-Chart Visualizations</text>
<text x='200' y='240' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='20'>AI-Driven Insights</text>
<circle cx='100' cy='230' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
<circle cx='230' cy='230' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
<circle cx='360' cy='230' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must use an AI-powered query playground for data exploration
Must implement dynamic filtering and sorting for multi-chart visualizations

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
